data.title: 国际服直播掉宝活动第1季
data.summary: [GO Watch and GO get your rewards! Go Go Drops Campaign Season 1] Sensei! Season 1 of the Drops Camp
data.body:
[GO Watch and GO get your rewards! Go Go Drops Campaign Season 1]

Sensei! Season 1 of the Drops Campaign is about to begin!

 GO watch Blue Archive streams and GO meet the watch requirements during the event to earn various rewards!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3297330
